Video.summary: Sid Caesar guests. Also, "V.I.P." interviews Lucy Brains and "Carol & Sis" finds Chris' interview complicated.
Video.title: Sid Caesar

Video.summary: Dick Van Dyke is Carol's guest, lending his impressive talents to an homage to Shirley Temple films.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Dick Van Dyke

Video.summary: Vincent Price stars in a salute to horror. George imagines he is gambler, & a pregnant pause on "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Vincent Price

Video.summary: Roddy McDowell & Ken Berry join in "High Hat", a spoof of Fred Astaire and Ginger Rogers movie musicals.
Video.title: Roddy McDowell, Ken Berry

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence and Rock Hudson spoof "The Murderer Always Rings Twice", and meet a decorator in "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Steve Lawrence, Rock Hudson

Video.summary: Andy Griffith guests, retelling a familiar Aesop fable in his own inimitable fashion.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Andy Griffith

Video.summary: Guest Jack Weston matches with Carol on a computer date, Carol sings, and Harvey plays Dr. Jekyll.
Video.title: Jack Weston

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence stars in a take-off on film "Double Indemnity"..here named "Double Calamity", with Carol too.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Tim Conway stars as a German interrogator in WWII. Carol plays a housewife listening to an advice show.
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Sketches include Harvey and Tim as dueling pianists, and a love triangle between Harvey, Cher...and Carol.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Cher

Video.summary: Nanette Fabray appears on "As The Stomach Turns." Also featured: "Carol & Sis" go gaga over Roger's briefcase.
Video.title: Nanette Fabray

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence guests! Includes Mr. Tudball attempting to explain the new intercom to secretary Mrs. Wiggins.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Highlights Dick Van Dyke as a TV announcer who fills in when technical difficulties scuttle the movie.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Bernadette Peters stars in a sketch about a woman introducing friends to each other. Also, an office visit.
Video.title: Bernadette Peters

Video.summary: Tim Conway guest stars as a hapless bus boy at a "Beniha-ha" restaurant who steps into an absent chef's role.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Roddy McDowell and The Jackson 5 guest star!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Roddy McDowall, Jackson Five

Video.summary: Guests Nancy Wilson and Nanette Fabray are here for tonight's "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Nancy Wilson, Nanette Fabray

Video.summary: Tim Conway stars! Tim will make you laugh as the World's Oldest Clockmaker, and as Ed's pal in "The Family."
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Tim Conway contributes in sketches as the Lone Ranger and as a man who lives a dog's life.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman

Image.alt: Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman

Video.summary: Vicki plays an author whose changes to her story are acted out, and Tim demonstrates the latest in safety.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Joan Rivers kills with her comedy set, while The Old Folks and the 10th Avenue Family appear in sketches.
Video.title: Joan Rivers

Video.summary: Guest Ken Berry is back to sing and dance his way into your heart.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Ken Berry

Video.summary: Clowning legend Emmett Kelly, a musical performance from The Jackson 5, and Carol in "A Swiped Life."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Emmett Kelly, Jackson Five

Video.summary: Tim Conway plays The Oldest Galley Slave, an ad exec visiting an actress, and a lawyer who is a rabbit.
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Bing Crosby and Rowan Martin guest! Bing's sketch is set in Brown Derby, while the "Laugh-In" boys are crooks.
Video.title: Bing Crosby, Rowan & Martin

Video.summary: Tonight's guest: Mr. Steve Lawrence!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Jack Palance guests, appearing in a gangster sketch. Carol and Roger meet Chris' new beau in "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Jack Palance

Video.summary: Tim Conway guest stars. Tim's engagement ring for Carol causes bad luck. Also featured: "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Guest George Gobel joins a "V.I.P." interview of a Duke and Duchess. A "Carol & Sis" sketch is also a prank.
Video.title: George Gobel

Video.summary: Bernadette Peters and Cass Elliot guest star in "As The Stomach Turns", and Lyle causes havoc and absurdity.
Video.title: Bernadette Peters, Cass Elliot

Video.summary: Ken Berry and Nanette Fabray star. Featuring Carol as a dowdy secretary, and the spoof "Flight 13 To Nowhere."
Video.title: Nanette Fabray, Ken Berry

Video.summary: Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, and Nancy Wilson all appear as guests on "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson

Image.alt: Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson

Video.summary: Features Harvey & Carol encounter a wishing well, and another installment of "The Family."
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Lucille Ball and Tim Conway guest star, highlighted by a sketch in which Lucy and Carol are Rent-A-Car agents.
Video.title: Lucille Ball, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Jim Nabors guests. Features Harvey's Emmy Award speech, and a presentation of "Hollywood Canteen."
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Paul Lynde & Nanette Fabray star, featuring "As The Stomach Turns", & reflecting on Carol's Charwoman persona.
Video.title: Paul Lynde, Nanette Fabray

Video.summary: Carol appears in a Late, Late Movie presentation of "A Swiped Life"-- take-off of "A Stolen Life."
Video.title: Family Show
